basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut has released the official Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 40 years with a qualification of Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with valid GATE/NET score OR Master’s and Bachelor’s degree in Physics with CSIR NET/JAM/GATE can apply via email on or before 11 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Essential: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering. Candidates should have valid GATE/NET score. Desirable: Master's degree in any stream of Engineering (OR) Essential: Master's and Bachelor's degree in Physics, and having qualified CSIR NET or JAM or GATE.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on applications Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 11th May 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering with a valid GATE/NET score, or a Master's and Bachelor's degree in Physics with CSIR NET, JAM, or GATE qualification. A Master's degree in any engineering stream is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus an additional 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and qualifications, followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is a contract-based role. The duration of the contract will be specified in the official appointment letter.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), identity proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with your bio-data.
